src: A person with wavy, fair warm-colored hair and a well-groomed beard, wearing a grey fleece with a quarter-zip, is positioned against a textured concrete wall.
edit: A character with exaggerated features, blonde, voluminous curls, a cartoonishly full beard, wearing a plush grey fleece jacket with a quarter-zip, stands in front of a textured animated wall typical of Pixar films, highlighted by vibrant lighting.
